revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月14日'''は[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[承久]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1221年]][[6月5日]]） - [[承久の乱]]。[[鎌倉幕府]]倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽上皇]]が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * [[天保]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1839年]][[6月24日]]） - [[蛮社の獄]]。[[渡辺崋山]]や[[高野長英]]らが逮捕される * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[6月17日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[神戸海軍操練所]]を開設。[[勝海舟]]を頭取に任命
== 誕生日 == * [[安貞]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1227年]][[6月29日]]） - [[北条時頼]]、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（+ [[1263年]]） * [[寛政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1793年]][[6月22日]]） - [[徳川家慶]]、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1853年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]16年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1588年]][[7月7日]]） - [[佐々成政]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516年]]） * [[慶長]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1606年]][[6月19日]]） - [[榊原康政]]、武将・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[7月4日]]） - [[徳川綱教]]、3代[[紀伊藩]]主・[[徳川吉宗]]の兄（* [[1665年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}
[[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[zh:五月十四]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]]

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月14日'''は[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[承久]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1221年]][[6月5日]]） - [[承久の乱]]。[[鎌倉幕府]]倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽上皇]]が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * [[天保]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1839年]][[6月24日]]） - [[蛮社の獄]]。[[渡辺崋山]]や[[高野長英]]らが逮捕される * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[6月17日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[神戸海軍操練所]]を開設。[[勝海舟]]を頭取に任命
== 誕生日 == * [[安貞]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1227年]][[6月29日]]） - [[北条時頼]]、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（+ [[1263年]]） * [[寛政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1793年]][[6月22日]]） - [[徳川家慶]]、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1853年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]16年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1588年]][[7月7日]]） - [[佐々成政]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516年]]） * [[慶長]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1606年]][[6月19日]]） - [[榊原康政]]、武将・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） <!--* [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[7月4日]]） - [[徳川綱教]]、3代[[紀伊藩]]主・[[徳川吉宗]]の兄（* [[1665年]]）--「[[徳川綱教]]」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}
[[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[zh:五月十四]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:旧暦5月]] to [[Category:旧暦May]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月14日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[承久]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1221年]][[6月5日]]） - [[承久の乱]]。[[鎌倉幕府]]倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]]が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * [[天保]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1839年]][[6月24日]]） - [[蛮社の獄]]。[[渡辺崋山]]や[[高野長英]]らが逮捕される * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[6月17日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[神戸海軍操練所]]を開設。[[勝海舟]]を頭取に任命
== 誕生日 == * [[安貞]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1227年]][[6月29日]]） - [[北条時頼]]<ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}}</ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（+ [[1263年]]） * [[寛政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1793年]][[6月22日]]） - [[徳川家慶]]、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1853年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]16年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1588年]][[7月7日]]） - [[佐々成政]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516年]]） * [[慶長]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1606年]][[6月19日]]） - [[榊原康政]]、武将・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） <!--* [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[7月4日]]） - [[徳川綱教]]、3代[[紀伊藩]]主・[[徳川吉宗]]の兄（* [[1665年]]）--「[[徳川綱教]]」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月14日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[承久]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1221年]][[6月5日]]） - [[承久の乱]]。[[鎌倉幕府]]倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]]が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * [[天保]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1839年]][[6月24日]]） - [[蛮社の獄]]。[[渡辺崋山]]や[[高野長英]]らが逮捕される * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[6月17日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[神戸海軍操練所]]を開設。[[勝海舟]]を頭取に任命
== 誕生日 == * [[安貞]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1227年]][[6月29日]]） - [[北条時頼]]<ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}}</ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（+ [[1263年]]） * [[寛政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1793年]][[6月22日]]） - [[徳川家慶]]、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1853年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]16年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1588年]][[7月7日]]） - [[佐々成政]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516年]]） * [[慶長]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1606年]][[6月19日]]） - [[榊原康政]]、武将・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） <!--* [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[7月4日]]） - [[徳川綱教]]、3代[[紀伊藩]]主・[[徳川吉宗]]の兄（* [[1665年]]）--「[[徳川綱教]]」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}

[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:旧暦May]][[sn:May 14日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

{{Lunar May}} '''Lunar May14日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[承久]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1221年]][[6月5日]]） - [[承久の乱]]。[[鎌倉幕府]]倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]]が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * [[天保]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1839年]][[6月24日]]） - [[蛮社の獄]]。[[渡辺崋山]]や[[高野長英]]らが逮捕される * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[6月17日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[神戸海軍操練所]]を開設。[[勝海舟]]を頭取に任命
== 誕生日 == * [[安貞]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1227年]][[6月29日]]） - [[北条時頼]]<ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}}</ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（+ [[1263年]]） * [[寛政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1793年]][[6月22日]]） - [[徳川家慶]]、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1853年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]16年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1588年]][[7月7日]]） - [[佐々成政]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516年]]） * [[慶長]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1606年]][[6月19日]]） - [[榊原康政]]、武将・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） <!--* [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[7月4日]]） - [[徳川綱教]]、3代[[紀伊藩]]主・[[徳川吉宗]]の兄（* [[1665年]]）--「[[徳川綱教]]」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

adding boilerplate intro to all the days
Text replacement - "六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]" to "六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]"
Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

Adding [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] marking all the pages that are not butsumetsu so I can use process of elimination to tag all Butsumetsu pages using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
trying to comment out all the bad overview sections I made earlier
adding these as a part 1 of a few steps to get names on the things

Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar360日" to "Lunar Calendar See Also"

I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates

[[sn:May 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] [[zh:五月十四]] [[en:draft:May 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[承久]]3年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1221]][[6月5日]]） - [[承久の乱]]。[[鎌倉幕府]]倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]]が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * [[天保]]10年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1839]][[6月24日]]） - [[蛮社の獄]]。[[渡辺崋山]]や[[高野長英]]らが逮捕される * [[元治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1864]][[6月17日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[神戸海軍操練所]]を開設。[[勝海舟]]を頭取に任命
== Births == * [[安貞]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1227]][[6月29日]]） - [[北条時頼]]<ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}}</ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（+ [[1263]]） * [[寛政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1793]][[6月22日]]） - [[徳川家慶]]、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1853]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]16年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1588]][[7月7日]]） - [[佐々成政]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516]]） * [[慶長]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1606]][[6月19日]]） - [[榊原康政]]、武将・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548]]） <「[[徳川綱教]]」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[承久]]3年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1221]][[6月5日]]） - [[承久の乱]]。[[鎌倉幕府]]倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]]が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * [[天保]]10年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1839]][[6月24日]]） - [[蛮社の獄]]。[[渡辺崋山]]や[[高野長英]]らが逮捕される * [[元治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1864]][[6月17日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[神戸海軍操練所]]を開設。[[勝海舟]]を頭取に任命

== Deaths == * [[天正]]16年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1588]][[7月7日]]） - [[佐々成政]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516]]） * [[慶長]]11th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1606]][[6月19日]]） - [[榊原康政]]、武将・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548]]） <「[[徳川綱教]]」では「5月18日」と記載-->

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[承久]]3rd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1221]][[6月5日]]） - [[承久の乱]]。[[鎌倉幕府]]倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]]が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * [[天保]]10年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1839]][[6月24日]]） - [[蛮社の獄]]。[[渡辺崋山]]や[[高野長英]]らが逮捕される * [[元治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1864]][[6月17日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[神戸海軍操練所]]を開設。[[勝海舟]]を頭取に任命
== Births == * [[安貞]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1227]][[6月29日]]） - [[北条時頼]]<ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}}</ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（+ [[1263]]） * [[寛政]]5th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1793]][[6月22日]]） - [[徳川家慶]]、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1853]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]16年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1588]][[7月7日]]） - [[佐々成政]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516]]） * [[慶長]]11th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1606]][[6月19日]]） - [[榊原康政]]、武将・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548]]） <「[[徳川綱教]]」では「5月18日」と記載-->

[[sn:May 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] [[zh:五月十四]] [[en:draft:May 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[承久]]3rd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1221]][[6月5日]]） - [[承久の乱]]。[[鎌倉幕府]]倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]]が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * [[天保]]10th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1839]][[6月24日]]） - [[蛮社の獄]]。[[渡辺崋山]]や[[高野長英]]らが逮捕される * [[元治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1864]][[6月17日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[神戸海軍操練所]]を開設。[[勝海舟]]を頭取に任命
== Births == * [[安貞]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1227]][[6月29日]]） - [[北条時頼]]<ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}}</ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（+ [[1263]]） * [[寛政]]5th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1793]][[6月22日]]） - [[徳川家慶]]、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1853]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]16th year（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1588]][[7月7日]]） - [[佐々成政]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516]]） * [[慶長]]11th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1606]][[6月19日]]） - [[榊原康政]]、武将・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548]]） <「[[徳川綱教]]」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}

== Events == * [[承久]]3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1221]][[6月5日]]） - [[承久の乱]]。[[鎌倉幕府]]倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]]が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]][[6月24日]]） - [[蛮社の獄]]。[[渡辺崋山]]や[[高野長英]]らが逮捕される * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}}1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]][[6月17日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[神戸海軍操練所]]を開設。[[勝海舟]]を頭取に任命

revision.comment: doing mass replacement for all western dates to english
revision.text:
[[sn:May 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] [[zh:五月十四]] [[en:draft:May 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[承久]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1221]] [[June 5]] ） - [[承久の乱]] 。[[鎌倉幕府]] 倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]] が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 24]] ） - [[蛮社の獄]] 。[[渡辺崋山]] や[[高野長英]] らが逮捕される * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[June 17]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が[[神戸海軍操練所]] を開設。[[勝海舟]] を頭取に任命
== Births == * [[安貞]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[June 29]] ） - [[北条時頼]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]] （+ [[1263]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[June 22]] ） - [[徳川家慶]] 、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1853]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 16th year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1588]] [[July 7]] ） - [[佐々成政]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1516]] ） * [[Keichō]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1606]] [[June 19]] ） - [[榊原康政]] 、武将・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） <「[[徳川綱教]] 」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[承久]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1221]] [[6月5日]] ） - [[承久の乱]] 。[[鎌倉幕府]] 倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]] が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[6月24日]] ） - [[蛮社の獄]] 。[[渡辺崋山]] や[[高野長英]] らが逮捕される * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[6月17日]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が[[神戸海軍操練所]] を開設。[[勝海舟]] を頭取に任命
== Births == * [[安貞]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[6月29日]] ） - [[北条時頼]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]] （+ [[1263]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[6月22日]] ） - [[徳川家慶]] 、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1853]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 16th year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1588]] [[7月7日]] ） - [[佐々成政]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1516]] ） * [[Keichō]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1606]] [[6月19日]] ） - [[榊原康政]] 、武将・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） <「[[徳川綱教]] 」では「5月18日」と記載-->

[[sn:May 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] [[zh:五月十四]] [[en:draft:May 14 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[承久]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1221]] [[June 5]] ） - [[承久の乱]] 。[[鎌倉幕府]] 倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]] が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 24]] ） - [[蛮社の獄]] 。[[渡辺崋山]] や[[高野長英]] らが逮捕される * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[June 17]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が[[神戸海軍操練所]] を開設。[[勝海舟]] を頭取に任命
== Births == * [[安貞]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[June 29]] ） - [[北条時頼]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]] （+ [[1263]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[June 22]] ） - [[徳川家慶]] 、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1853]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 16th year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1588]] [[July 7]] ） - [[佐々成政]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1516]] ） * [[Keichō]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1606]] [[June 19]] ） - [[榊原康政]] 、武将・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） <「[[徳川綱教]] 」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:May 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] [[zh:五月十四]] [[en:draft:May 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[承久]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1221]] [[June 5]] ） - [[承久の乱]] 。[[鎌倉幕府]] 倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]] が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 24]] ） - [[蛮社の獄]] 。[[渡辺崋山]] や[[高野長英]] らが逮捕される * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[June 17]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が[[神戸海軍操練所]] を開設。[[勝海舟]] を頭取に任命
== Births == * [[安貞]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[June 29]] ） - [[北条時頼]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]] （+ [[1263]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[June 22]] ） - [[徳川家慶]] 、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1853]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 16th year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1588]] [[July 7]] ） - [[佐々成政]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1516]] ） * [[Keichō]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1606]] [[June 19]] ） - [[榊原康政]] 、武将・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） <「[[徳川綱教]] 」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}

[[sn:May 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] [[zh:五月十四]] [[en:draft:May 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[承久]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1221]] [[June 5]] ） - [[承久の乱]] 。[[鎌倉幕府]] 倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]] が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 24]] ） - [[蛮社の獄]] 。[[渡辺崋山]] や[[高野長英]] らが逮捕される * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[June 17]] ） - [[江戸幕府]] が[[神戸海軍操練所]] を開設。[[勝海舟]] を頭取に任命
== Births == * [[安貞]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[June 29]] ） - [[北条時頼]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[Shikken]] （+ [[1263]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[June 22]] ） - [[徳川家慶]] 、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1853]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 16th year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1588]] [[July 7]] ） - [[佐々成政]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1516]] ） * [[Keichō]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1606]] [[June 19]] ） - [[榊原康政]] 、武将・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） <「[[徳川綱教]] 」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}

[[sn:May 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] [[zh:五月十四]] [[en:draft:May 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Jōkyū]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1221]] [[June 5]] ） - [[承久の乱]] 。[[鎌倉幕府]] 倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]] が近隣諸国のSamurai1700騎を結集 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 24]] ） - [[蛮社の獄]] 。[[渡辺崋山]] や[[高野長英]] らが逮捕される * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[June 17]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が[[神戸海軍操練所]] を開設。[[Katsu Kaishū]] を頭取に任命
== Births == * [[安貞]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[June 29]] ） - [[Hojo Tokiyori]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[Shikken]] （+ [[1263]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[June 22]] ） - [[徳川家慶]] 、 Tokugawa shogunate12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1853]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 16th year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1588]] [[July 7]] ） - [[佐々成政]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1516]] ） * [[Keichō]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1606]] [[June 19]] ） - [[榊原康政]] 、武将・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） <「[[徳川綱教]] 」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}

[[sn:May 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] [[zh:五月十四]] [[en:draft:May 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Jōkyū]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1221]] [[June 5]] ） - [[承久の乱]] 。[[Kamakura shogunate]] 倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]] が近隣諸国のSamurai1700騎を結集 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 24]] ） - [[蛮社の獄]] 。[[渡辺崋山]] や[[高野長英]] らが逮捕される * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[June 17]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が[[神戸海軍操練所]] を開設。[[Katsu Kaishū]] を頭取に任命
== Births == * [[安貞]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[June 29]] ） - [[Hojo Tokiyori]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[Shikken]] （+ [[1263]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[June 22]] ） - [[徳川家慶]] 、 Tokugawa shogunate12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1853]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 16th year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1588]] [[July 7]] ） - [[佐々成政]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1516]] ） * [[Keichō]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1606]] [[June 19]] ） - [[榊原康政]] 、武将・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） <「[[徳川綱教]] 」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== Commemorations ==== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}

[[sn:May 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] [[zh:五月十四]] [[en:draft:May 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Jōkyū]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1221]] [[June 5]] ） - [[承久の乱]] 。[[Kamakura shogunate]] 倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]] が近隣諸国のSamurai1700騎を結集 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 24]] ） - [[蛮社の獄]] 。[[渡辺崋山]] や[[高野長英]] らが逮捕される * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[June 17]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が[[神戸海軍操練所]] を開設。[[Katsu Kaishū]] を頭取に任命
== Births == * [[安貞]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[June 29]] ） - [[Hojo Tokiyori]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[Shikken]] （+ [[1263]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[June 22]] ） - [[徳川家慶]] 、 Tokugawa shogunate12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1853]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 16th year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1588]] [[July 7]] ） - [[佐々成政]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1516]] ） * [[Keichō]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1606]] [[June 19]] ） - [[榊原康政]] 、武将・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） <「[[徳川綱教]] 」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}

revision.text:
[[sn:May 14 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] [[zh:五月十四]] [[en:draft:May 14 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Jōkyū]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1221]] [[June 5]] ） - [[承久の乱]] 。[[Kamakura shogunate]] 倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]] が近隣諸国のSamurai1700騎を結集 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 24]] ） - [[蛮社の獄]] 。[[渡辺崋山]] や[[高野長英]] らが逮捕される * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[June 17]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が[[神戸海軍操練所]] を開設。[[Katsu Kaishū]] を頭取に任命
== Births == * [[安貞]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[June 29]] ） - [[Hojo Tokiyori]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[Shikken]] （+ [[1263]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[June 22]] ） - [[徳川家慶]] 、 Tokugawa shogunate12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1853]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 16th year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1588]] [[July 7]] ） - [[佐々成政]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1516]] ） * [[Keichō]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1606]] [[June 19]] ） - [[榊原康政]] 、武将・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） <「[[徳川綱教]] 」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[Jōkyū]] 3rd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1221]] [[June 5]] ） - [[承久の乱]] 。[[Kamakura shogunate]] 倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]] が近隣諸国のSamurai1700騎を結集 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 10th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1839]] [[June 24]] ） - [[蛮社の獄]] 。[[渡辺崋山]] や[[高野長英]] らが逮捕される * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1864]] [[June 17]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が[[神戸海軍操練所]] を開設。[[Katsu Kaishū]] を頭取に任命
== Births == * [[安貞]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1227]] [[June 29]] ） - [[Hojo Tokiyori]] <ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}} </ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[Shikken]] （+ [[1263]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[June 22]] ） - [[徳川家慶]] 、 Tokugawa shogunate12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1853]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 16th year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1588]] [[July 7]] ） - [[佐々成政]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1516]] ） * [[Keichō]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1606]] [[June 19]] ） - [[榊原康政]] 、武将・[[徳川四天王]] の一人（* [[1548]] ） <「[[徳川綱教]] 」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]]
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]]

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Jōkyū|ja|承久}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1221]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日}}) – In the incident known as {{ill|Jōkyū no Ran|ja|承久の乱}}, the forces of the Kamakura shogunate, seeking to overthrow the regime, were assembled by {{ill|Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja|後鳥羽上皇}} along with approximately 1700 samurai from neighboring provinces. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1839]] {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}}) – In the event known as the {{ill|Bansha no Goku|ja|蛮社の獄}}, figures such as {{ill|Watanabe Kōzan|ja|渡辺崋山}} and {{ill|Takano Chōei|ja|高野長英}} were arrested. * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1864]] {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate established the Kobe Naval Training Center, appointing {{ill|Katsu Kaishū|ja|勝海舟}} as its head.
== Births == * [[Antei]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1227]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}}) – {{ill|Hojo Tokiyori|ja|北条時頼}}, the 5th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[1263]]). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1793]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iekei|ja|徳川家慶}}, the 12th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[1853]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 16th year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1588]] {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}}) – {{ill|Sasasa Narimasa|ja|佐々成政}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}}) (born [[1516]]). * [[Keichō]] 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1606]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日}}) – {{ill|Sakakibara Yasumasa|ja|榊原康政}}, a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born [[1548]]). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.>
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Jōkyū|ja|承久}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1221]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日}}) – In the incident known as {{ill|Jōkyū no Ran|ja|承久の乱}}, the forces of the Kamakura shogunate, seeking to overthrow the regime, were assembled by {{ill|Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja|後鳥羽上皇}} along with approximately 1700 samurai from neighboring provinces. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1839]] {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}}) – In the event known as the {{ill|Bansha no Goku|ja|蛮社の獄}}, figures such as {{ill|Watanabe Kōzan|ja|渡辺崋山}} and {{ill|Takano Chōei|ja|高野長英}} were arrested. * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1864]] {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate established the Kobe Naval Training Center, appointing {{ill|Katsu Kaishū|ja|勝海舟}} as its head.
== Births == * [[Antei]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1227]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}}) – {{ill|Hojo Tokiyori|ja|北条時頼}}, the 5th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[1263]]). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1793]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iekei|ja|徳川家慶}}, the 12th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[1853]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 16th year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1588]] {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日}}) – {{ill|Sasasa Narimasa|ja|佐々成政}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}}) (born [[1516]]). * [[Keichō]] 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1606]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日}}) – {{ill|Sakakibara Yasumasa|ja|榊原康政}}, a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born [[1548]]). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.>
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]]

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Jōkyū|ja|承久|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1221]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|12=draft}}) – In the incident known as {{ill|Jōkyū no Ran|ja|承久の乱|12=draft}}, the forces of the Kamakura shogunate, seeking to overthrow the regime, were assembled by {{ill|Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja|後鳥羽上皇|12=draft}} along with approximately 1700 samurai from neighboring provinces. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1839]] {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日|12=draft}}) – In the event known as the {{ill|Bansha no Goku|ja|蛮社の獄|12=draft}}, figures such as {{ill|Watanabe Kōzan|ja|渡辺崋山|12=draft}} and {{ill|Takano Chōei|ja|高野長英|12=draft}} were arrested. * {{ill|Genji|ja|元治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1864]] {{ill|June 17|ja|6月17日|12=draft}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate established the Kobe Naval Training Center, appointing {{ill|Katsu Kaishū|ja|勝海舟|12=draft}} as its head.
== Births == * [[Antei]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1227]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hojo Tokiyori|ja|北条時頼|12=draft}}, the 5th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[1263]]). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1793]] {{ill|June 22|ja|6月22日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iekei|ja|徳川家慶|12=draft}}, the 12th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[1853]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 16th year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1588]] {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sasasa Narimasa|ja|佐々成政|12=draft}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}}) (born [[1516]]). * [[Keichō]] 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1606]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sakakibara Yasumasa|ja|榊原康政|12=draft}}, a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born [[1548]]). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教|12=draft}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.>
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 16th year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1588]] {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sasasa Narimasa|ja|佐々成政|12=draft}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}}) (born [[1516]]). * [[Keichō]] 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1606]] {{ill|June 19|ja|6月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sakakibara Yasumasa|ja|榊原康政|12=draft}}, a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born [[1548]]). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教|12=draft}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.>
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月14日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の14日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[承久]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1221年]][[6月5日]]） - [[承久の乱]]。[[鎌倉幕府]]倒幕の為、[[後鳥羽天皇|後鳥羽上皇]]が近隣諸国の武士1700騎を結集 * [[天保]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1839年]][[6月24日]]） - [[蛮社の獄]]。[[渡辺崋山]]や[[高野長英]]らが逮捕される * [[元治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1864年]][[6月17日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[神戸海軍操練所]]を開設。[[勝海舟]]を頭取に任命
== 誕生日 == * [[安貞]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1227年]][[6月29日]]） - [[北条時頼]]<ref>{{Harvnb|北条氏研究会|2001|p=280}}</ref>、鎌倉幕府5代[[執権]]（+ [[1263年]]） * [[寛政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1793年]][[6月22日]]） - [[徳川家慶]]、 江戸幕府12代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1853年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]16年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1588年]][[7月7日]]） - [[佐々成政]]、[[武将]]（* [[1516年]]） * [[慶長]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1606年]][[6月19日]]） - [[榊原康政]]、武将・[[徳川四天王]]の一人（* [[1548年]]） <!--* [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[7月4日]]） - [[徳川綱教]]、3代[[紀伊藩]]主・[[徳川吉宗]]の兄（* [[1665年]]）--「[[徳川綱教]]」では「5月18日」と記載-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十四]][[zh:五月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839544]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 14|qq=May 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Jōkyū|Jōkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1221|1221]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – In the incident known as [[:en:Jōkyū War|Jōkyū no Ran]], the forces of the Kamakura shogunate, seeking to overthrow the regime, were assembled by {{ill|Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja|後鳥羽上皇|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後鳥羽天皇|1=Go-Toba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q316658}} along with approximately 1700 samurai from neighboring provinces. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – In the event known as the [[:en:Bansha no goku|Bansha no Goku]], figures such as [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kōzan]] and [[:en:Takano Chōei|Takano Chōei]] were arrested. * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate established the Kobe Naval Training Center, appointing [[:en:Katsu Kaishū|Katsu Kaishū]] as its head.
== Births == * [[:en:Antei|Antei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokiyori|Hojo Tokiyori]], the 5th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1263|1263]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Iekei]], the 12th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1853|1853]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 16th year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1588|1588]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Sassa Narimasa|Sasasa Narimasa]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1516|1516]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Sakakibara Yasumasa|Sakakibara Yasumasa]], a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|qq=|1=Tokugawa Tsunanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992849}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.> == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十四]][[zh:五月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839544]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 14|qq=May 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Jōkyū|Jōkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1221|1221]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – In the incident known as [[:en:Jōkyū War|Jōkyū no Ran]], the forces of the Kamakura shogunate, seeking to overthrow the regime, were assembled by {{ill|Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja|後鳥羽上皇|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後鳥羽天皇|1=Go-Toba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q316658}} along with approximately 1700 samurai from neighboring provinces. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – In the event known as the [[:en:Bansha no goku|Bansha no Goku]], figures such as [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kōzan]] and [[:en:Takano Chōei|Takano Chōei]] were arrested. * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate established the Kobe Naval Training Center, appointing [[:en:Katsu Kaishū|Katsu Kaishū]] as its head.
== Births == * [[:en:Antei|Antei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokiyori|Hojo Tokiyori]], the 5th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1263|1263]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Iekei]], the 12th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1853|1853]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 16th year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1588|1588]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Sassa Narimasa|Sasasa Narimasa]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1516|1516]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Sakakibara Yasumasa|Sakakibara Yasumasa]], a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|qq=|1=Tokugawa Tsunanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992849}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.> == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:Antei|Antei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokiyori|Hojo Tokiyori]], the 5th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1263|1263]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Iekei]], the 12th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1853|1853]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 16th year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1588|1588]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Sassa Narimasa|Sasasa Narimasa]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1516|1516]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Sakakibara Yasumasa|Sakakibara Yasumasa]], a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992849}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.> == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十四]][[zh:五月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839544]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 14|qq=May 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Jōkyū|Jōkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1221|1221]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – In the incident known as [[:en:Jōkyū War|Jōkyū no Ran]], the forces of the Kamakura shogunate, seeking to overthrow the regime, were assembled by {{ill|Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja|後鳥羽上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後鳥羽天皇|1=Go-Toba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q316658}} along with approximately 1700 samurai from neighboring provinces. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – In the event known as the [[:en:Bansha no goku|Bansha no Goku]], figures such as [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kōzan]] and [[:en:Takano Chōei|Takano Chōei]] were arrested. * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate established the Kobe Naval Training Center, appointing [[:en:Katsu Kaishū|Katsu Kaishū]] as its head.
== Births == * [[:en:Antei|Antei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokiyori|Hojo Tokiyori]], the 5th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1263|1263]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Iekei]], the 12th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1853|1853]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 16th year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1588|1588]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Sassa Narimasa|Sasasa Narimasa]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1516|1516]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Sakakibara Yasumasa|Sakakibara Yasumasa]], a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992849}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.> == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]]
{{translated page|ja|5月14日 (旧暦)|version=97894755|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar May]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]][[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Days 14 of Japanese Lunar months]]
}}

[[ko:음력 5월 14일]] [[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月十四]]

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十四]] {{wikidata link|Q839544}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十四]][[zh:五月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839544]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 14|qq=May 14}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Jōkyū|Jōkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1221|1221]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – In the incident known as [[:en:Jōkyū War|Jōkyū no Ran]], the forces of the Kamakura shogunate, seeking to overthrow the regime, were assembled by {{ill|Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja|後鳥羽上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後鳥羽天皇|1=Go-Toba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q316658}} along with approximately 1700 samurai from neighboring provinces. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – In the event known as the [[:en:Bansha no goku|Bansha no Goku]], figures such as [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kōzan]] and [[:en:Takano Chōei|Takano Chōei]] were arrested. * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate established the Kobe Naval Training Center, appointing [[:en:Katsu Kaishū|Katsu Kaishū]] as its head.
== Births == * [[:en:Antei|Antei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokiyori|Hojo Tokiyori]], the 5th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1263|1263]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Iekei]], the 12th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1853|1853]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 16th year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1588|1588]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Sassa Narimasa|Sasasa Narimasa]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1516|1516]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Sakakibara Yasumasa|Sakakibara Yasumasa]], a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992849}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.> == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:Antei|Antei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokiyori|Hojo Tokiyori]], the 5th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1263|1263]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Iekei]], the 12th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1853|1853]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 16th year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1588|1588]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Sassa Narimasa|Sasasa Narimasa]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1516|1516]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Sakakibara Yasumasa|Sakakibara Yasumasa]], a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992849}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.> == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十四]][[zh:五月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十四]][[zh:五月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十四]][[zh:五月十四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839544]] Wikidata name: 14th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 14|qq=May 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Jōkyū|Jōkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1221|1221]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – In the incident known as [[:en:Jōkyū War|Jōkyū no Ran]], the forces of the Kamakura shogunate, seeking to overthrow the regime, were assembled by {{ill|Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja|後鳥羽上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後鳥羽天皇|1=Go-Toba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q316658}} along with approximately 1700 samurai from neighboring provinces. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – In the event known as the [[:en:Bansha no goku|Bansha no Goku]], figures such as [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kōzan]] and [[:en:Takano Chōei|Takano Chōei]] were arrested. * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate established the Kobe Naval Training Center, appointing [[:en:Katsu Kaishū|Katsu Kaishū]] as its head.
== Births == * [[:en:Antei|Antei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokiyori|Hojo Tokiyori]], the 5th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1263|1263]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Iekei]], the 12th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1853|1853]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 16th year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1588|1588]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Sassa Narimasa|Sasasa Narimasa]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1516|1516]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Sakakibara Yasumasa|Sakakibara Yasumasa]], a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992849}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.> == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Jōkyū|Jōkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1221|1221]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – In the incident known as [[:en:Jōkyū War|Jōkyū no Ran]], the forces of the Kamakura shogunate, seeking to overthrow the regime, were assembled by {{ill|Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja|後鳥羽上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後鳥羽天皇|1=Go-Toba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q316658}} along with approximately 1700 samurai from neighboring provinces. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – In the event known as the [[:en:Bansha no goku|Bansha no Goku]], figures such as [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kōzan]] and [[:en:Takano Chōei|Takano Chōei]] were arrested. * [[:en:Genji era|Genji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1864|1864]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate established the Kobe Naval Training Center, appointing [[:en:Katsu Kaishū|Katsu Kaishū]] as its head.
== Births == * [[:en:Antei|Antei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1227|1227]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Tokiyori|Hojo Tokiyori]], the 5th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1263|1263]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:June 22|June 22]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyoshi|Tokugawa Iekei]], the 12th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died [[:en:1853|1853]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 16th year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1588|1588]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Sassa Narimasa|Sasasa Narimasa]], a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born [[:en:1516|1516]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1606|1606]] [[:en:June 19|June 19]]) – [[:en:Sakakibara Yasumasa|Sakakibara Yasumasa]], a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born [[:en:1548|1548]]). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992849}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.> == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十四]][[zh:五月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十四]][[zh:五月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十四]][[zh:五月十四]]
{{Not to be confused with|May 14|qq=May 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Jōkyū|en|Jōkyū|WD=Q1195428|lt=Jōkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1221|en|1221|WD=Q5393|lt=1221}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5}}) – In the incident known as {{ill|Jōkyū War|en|Jōkyū War|WD=Q1372308|lt=Jōkyū no Ran}}, the forces of the Kamakura shogunate, seeking to overthrow the regime, were assembled by {{ill|Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja|後鳥羽上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後鳥羽天皇|1=Go-Toba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q316658}} along with approximately 1700 samurai from neighboring provinces. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|WD=Q7616|lt=1839}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|WD=Q2665|lt=June 24}}) – In the event known as the {{ill|Bansha no goku|en|Bansha no goku|WD=Q2883476|lt=Bansha no Goku}}, figures such as {{ill|Watanabe Kazan|en|Watanabe Kazan|WD=Q3130609|lt=Watanabe Kōzan}} and {{ill|Takano Chōei|en|Takano Chōei|WD=Q944693|lt=Takano Chōei}} were arrested. * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|WD=Q1325419|lt=Genji}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|WD=Q7704|lt=1864}} {{ill|June 17|en|June 17|WD=Q2672|lt=June 17}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate established the Kobe Naval Training Center, appointing {{ill|Katsu Kaishū|en|Katsu Kaishū|WD=Q700470|lt=Katsu Kaishū}} as its head.
== Births == * {{ill|Antei|en|Antei|WD=Q737537|lt=Antei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1227|en|1227|WD=Q5407|lt=1227}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Tokiyori|en|Hōjō Tokiyori|WD=Q1354410|lt=Hojo Tokiyori}}, the 5th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (died {{ill|1263|en|1263|WD=Q5512|lt=1263}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1793|en|1793|WD=Q7807|lt=1793}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|en|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|WD=Q439675|lt=Tokugawa Iekei}}, the 12th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 16th year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1588|en|1588|WD=Q6757|lt=1588}} {{ill|July 7|en|July 7|WD=Q2694|lt=July 7}}) – {{ill|Sassa Narimasa|en|Sassa Narimasa|WD=Q1186700|lt=Sasasa Narimasa}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born {{ill|1516|en|1516|WD=Q6212|lt=1516}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1606|en|1606|WD=Q6747|lt=1606}} {{ill|June 19|en|June 19|WD=Q2669|lt=June 19}}) – {{ill|Sakakibara Yasumasa|en|Sakakibara Yasumasa|WD=Q1062738|lt=Sakakibara Yasumasa}}, a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born {{ill|1548|en|1548|WD=Q6551|lt=1548}}). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992849}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.> == Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十四]][[zh:五月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十四]][[zh:五月十四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十四]][[zh:五月十四]]
{{Not to be confused with|May 14|qq=May 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Jōkyū|en|Jōkyū|WD=Q1195428|lt=Jōkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1221|en|1221|WD=Q5393|lt=1221}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5}}) – In the incident known as {{ill|Jōkyū War|en|Jōkyū War|WD=Q1372308|lt=Jōkyū no Ran}}, the forces of the Kamakura shogunate, seeking to overthrow the regime, were assembled by {{ill|Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja|後鳥羽上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Go-Toba†Go-Toba_Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後鳥羽天皇|1=Go-Toba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q316658}} along with approximately 1700 samurai from neighboring provinces. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|WD=Q7616|lt=1839}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|WD=Q2665|lt=June 24}}) – In the event known as the {{ill|Bansha no goku|en|Bansha no goku|WD=Q2883476|lt=Bansha no Goku}}, figures such as {{ill|Watanabe Kazan|en|Watanabe Kazan|WD=Q3130609|lt=Watanabe Kōzan}} and {{ill|Takano Chōei|en|Takano Chōei|WD=Q944693|lt=Takano Chōei}} were arrested. * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|WD=Q1325419|lt=Genji}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|WD=Q7704|lt=1864}} {{ill|June 17|en|June 17|WD=Q2672|lt=June 17}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate established the Kobe Naval Training Center, appointing {{ill|Katsu Kaishū|en|Katsu Kaishū|WD=Q700470|lt=Katsu Kaishū}} as its head.
== Births == * {{ill|Antei|en|Antei|WD=Q737537|lt=Antei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1227|en|1227|WD=Q5407|lt=1227}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Tokiyori|en|Hōjō Tokiyori|WD=Q1354410|lt=Hojo Tokiyori}}, the 5th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (died {{ill|1263|en|1263|WD=Q5512|lt=1263}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1793|en|1793|WD=Q7807|lt=1793}} {{ill|June 22|en|June 22|WD=Q2663|lt=June 22}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|en|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|WD=Q439675|lt=Tokugawa Iekei}}, the 12th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate (died {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 16th year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1588|en|1588|WD=Q6757|lt=1588}} {{ill|July 7|en|July 7|WD=Q2694|lt=July 7}}) – {{ill|Sassa Narimasa|en|Sassa Narimasa|WD=Q1186700|lt=Sasasa Narimasa}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born {{ill|1516|en|1516|WD=Q6212|lt=1516}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1606|en|1606|WD=Q6747|lt=1606}} {{ill|June 19|en|June 19|WD=Q2669|lt=June 19}}) – {{ill|Sakakibara Yasumasa|en|Sakakibara Yasumasa|WD=Q1062738|lt=Sakakibara Yasumasa}}, a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born {{ill|1548|en|1548|WD=Q6551|lt=1548}}). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992849}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.> == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|13|5|15|4|14|6|5|0514|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 16th year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1588|en|1588|WD=Q6757|lt=1588|1=1588}} {{ill|July 7|en|July 7|WD=Q2694|lt=July 7|1=July 7}}) – {{ill|Sassa Narimasa|en|Sassa Narimasa|WD=Q1186700|lt=Sasasa Narimasa|1=Sassa Narimasa}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}}) (born {{ill|1516|en|1516|WD=Q6212|lt=1516|1=1516}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1606|en|1606|WD=Q6747|lt=1606|1=1606}} {{ill|June 19|en|June 19|WD=Q2669|lt=June 19|1=June 19}}) – {{ill|Sakakibara Yasumasa|en|Sakakibara Yasumasa|WD=Q1062738|lt=Sakakibara Yasumasa|1=Sakakibara Yasumasa}}, a military commander and one of the Tokugawa Four Heavenly Kings (born {{ill|1548|en|1548|WD=Q6551|lt=1548|1=1548}}). <“{{ill|Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|ja|徳川綱教|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsuneyoshi|1=Tokugawa Tsunanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6992849}}” has a note stating “May 18” in another account.> == Commemorations ==
